w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: "Make quality food accessible and affordable while reducing food waste in India's tier-2 cities."

A mobile marketplace connecting restaurants with surplus fresh food to customers looking for affordable meals. Customers purchase "Surprise Boxes" at 60-70% discount without knowing exact contents, pickup same evening.
Monthly Active Users (MAU): Target 5,000 by Month 6
Average orders per user per month: 2-3
Average boxes per restaurant per day: 8-10
Software Engineer at local IT company
Regular restaurant prices too high for daily use
Willing to compromise on choice for price
Social activity (picking up boxes with friends)
Quick dinner solution on busy days
No time to cook after work some days
Uses smartphone for WhatsApp, basic apps
Not tech-expert but willing to learn simple tools
Busy during peak hours, needs quick interface
3.1 Customer User Flow - First Time Purchase
START: User hears about app from friend
> Available boxes count (8 boxes near you)
│ │ "Reminder: Pick up your box in 1 hour!"
START: User opens app (already logged in)
> Recommended box highlighted: "You loved this last time!"
START: Restaurant partner logs into Partner App
│ │ │ └─> Text field: "Pizza slices, garlic bread, pasta"
> Real-time counter: "2 boxes reserved so far!"
│ │ │ │ └─> Actions: Call | Mark as Picked Up
> Customer shows QR code / says code
> Staff scans QR OR enters code manually:
> Restaurant marks "No-show" after 30 min grace period
│ └─> Requires ₹50 advance deposit for future reservations
All boxes sold out earlier than expected
│ "Mark all remaining boxes as sold out?
Customer receives box, unhappy with quality
│ "We're sorry! Our team will review within 24 hours.
│ Meanwhile, here's ₹50 credit for your next order."
Would you give us another try?"
User can sign up with phone number in <60 seconds
User remains logged in across app restarts
: List of available boxes near user
User sees boxes within 5km by default
No boxes shown after pickup time ends
All info visible without scrolling (key details)
QR code scannable by partner app
Confirmation sent via WhatsApp within 10 sec
Pickup time + countdown ("Pick up in 2 hrs")
Can cancel >2 hours before without penalty
User can view their own past ratings
Ratings visible to other users within 5 min
Restaurant sees ratings in partner app
"New boxes available near you!" (4 PM daily)
User can enable/disable each notification type
Actions: Call customer, Mark picked up, Report no-show
Restaurant can list boxes in <1 minute
Can edit listing before first reservation
: Receives full amount, pays commission to platform weekly
: Collects commission via bank transfer/UPI from restaurant
: Restaurant sees commission deduction in real-time
Customer sees "Pay cash at pickup" clearly
Adds complexity, cash works fine initially
Personalization valuable but not critical for MVP
Engagement booster but needs user base first
Free delivery (if we add delivery later)
Need to prove value first, then upsell
Adds operational complexity, ruins unit economics
Detailed charts: Sales trends, peak times
Nice for retention but not essential
Different business model, focus on B2C first
Rewards: Free boxes, merch, partner discounts
Retention tool, needs engaged user base
User can swipe or tap Next
Send OTP via SMS + WhatsApp simultaneously
Firebase Phone Auth OR custom OTP service
Cuisine filters: Pizza, Bakery, Indian, Chinese, etc.
Real-time updates via WebSocket OR polling every 30sec
Image lazy loading (load as user scrolls)
Share icon (right) - share box with friends
"View on Map" button → Opens map view
Optimistic updates (reserve button disabled immediately on tap)
Screen 6: Map View (Embedded in Box Details)
"Get Directions" button → Opens Google Maps app
on restaurant, zoom to show both points
Tapping "Get Directions" → geo: URI for Google Maps
Appears as bottom sheet when "Reserve" tapped:
I agree to pick up within
Terms checkbox (must check to enable button)
Swipe down or tap outside to dismiss
Checkbox must be checked to proceed
Confirm button → API call → Success screen
On success → Navigate to Confirmation screen
On error → Show error toast, stay on modal
"View My Reservations" button (takes to reservations list)
QR format: Standard (scannable by any QR reader)
Empty state: "No active reservations. Browse boxes!"
Tap card → Expands to show full details
"View QR Code" → Expands QR within card
Photo upload section (camera icon, gallery picker)
Quick tag pills (multi-select, highlights on tap)
: Avatar (initials if no photo), Name, Phone
Store notification preferences locally + sync to backend
Toggles trigger immediate save (no "Save" button needed)
Only restaurant owners can access (phone verified during onboarding)
OTP verification same as customer app
Boxes listed, sold, picked up, pending
Hamburger menu (top left): Profile, Settings, Help, Logout
Error → Toast message, stay on form
Can edit/cancel listing until first reservation comes in.
Customer phone (masked, full visible on tap)
Ask: "Collect ₹99 cash and hand over box"
Parse QR data, verify with backend
│ Will be paid on: Friday, Mar 14 │
Charts using Chart.js or native charting library
PDF generation on backend (email link to download)
Why: Single codebase, faster development, 90% code sharing
Same stack as customer app (shared components where possible)
Performance adequate for this use case (not gaming/heavy graphics)
ACID compliance important for financial transactions
Migrate to AWS/GCP if scale demands
All estimates assume 1,000 active users, 200 boxes/day
│ UPDATE boxes SET quantity = quantity - 1 WHERE id = 123
8. WebSocket broadcasts to all connected clients
> Cache in Redis for fast retrieval
5. WebSocket broadcasts to all connected customers
INT NOT NULL REFERENCES restaurants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
INT NOT NULL, -- Total boxes listed
INT NOT NULL REFERENCES listings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
INT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
INT NOT NULL REFERENCES reservations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
stars INT NOT NULL CHECK (stars >= 1 AND stars <= 5),
"feedback": "Amazing! Got 3 huge pizza slices + garlic bread. Totally worth it!",
INT REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
INT REFERENCES restaurants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
* Fast caching, real-time availability, session storage
Bearer JWT token in Authorization header
Send OTP to phone number for signup/login.
Verify OTP and get JWT token.
Get details of a specific listing.
"address": "Camp Road, opp. HDFC Bank, Vidyanagar, Hubli - 580021",
- `429` User already has reservation for this time
Submit a rating for a reservation.
"feedback": "Amazing! Got 3 huge pizza slices + garlic bread.",
"feedback": "Amazing! Got 3 huge pizza slices + garlic bread.",
Subscribe to listing updates in a specific area.
Subscribe to updates for a specific reservation.
Sent when a listing's availability changes.
Sent when a listing sells out.
Sent to restaurant when new reservation is made.
Sent to restaurant when customer cancels.
